verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your Blood speaks a better word Your Love speaks a better word

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is therefore now no condemnation For those who are in Christ Jesus Where are Your accusers now? Where are Your accusers now?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: With the mighty hand and an outstretch arms You are the God who saves, deliverer Your Name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You put the ring upon my finger You put the robe upon my back You throw Your arms around me and say, "You are my son, my daughter, don't forget"

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Salvation belongs to the Lord Salvation belongs to the Lord (4x)
